title: Plain-language + reading/writing-vocab study support + initial a11y pass on items
context: Many learners have limited English and limited income; plain-language phrasing and reading/writing-vocabulary support widen access to the citizenship items. This initial accessibility pass keeps items studyable for low-literacy and low-vision learners.
objective: Add plain-language phrasing and reading/writing-vocabulary study support and run an initial accessibility pass over the citizenship items.
acceptanceCriteria: Item stems/rationales meet the plain-language reading-level target with reading/writing-vocabulary study support added
Initial accessibility pass on items completed (keyboard + screen-reader considerations noted for the app)
No change to cited official answers; provenance and labeling preserved
